sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint implies timeout and abandonment behavior but does not name exact timeout windows for menu_selected, identity_in_progress, or recording_expected.
decisionTaken: Freeze phase2-call-session-timeout-policy-188.v1 with menu_selected = 180 seconds to abandoned, identity_in_progress = 240 seconds to manual_followup_required, and recording_expected = 600 seconds to recording_missing.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The policy is conservative, observable, and keeps routine promotion blocked until later authoritative readiness records settle.
operationalRisk: Too-short windows may increase manual work; too-long windows may delay abandonment and recording-missing handling.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Change the timeout policy version and regenerate the timeout-policy schema, operations doc, and replay tests.
